item.title: 2016 in Sri Lanka
item.description: The following lists notable events that occurred during 2016 in Sri Lanka.

item.title: Clifford John Earle Jr.
item.description: Clifford John Earle, Jr. (November 3, 1935 – June 12, 2017) was an American mathematician who specialized in complex variables and Teichmüller spaces.

item.title: Natsuse Dam
item.description: Natsuse Dam is a gravity dam located in Akita Prefecture in Japan. The dam is used for power production. The catchment area of the dam is 637.4 km2. The dam impounds about 86 ha of land when full and can store 5959 thousand cubic meters of water. The construction of the dam was started on 1938 and completed in 1940.[1]

item.title: 2005 All-Ireland Senior Hurling Championship final
item.description: The 2005 All-Ireland Senior Hurling Championship Final was a hurling match that took place on Sunday, 11 September 2005. The match was played at Croke Park in Dublin, Ireland, to determine the winner of the 2005 All-Ireland Senior Hurling Championship. The final was contested by Cork and Galway, with Cork winning on a score line of 1–21 to 1–16. It was their second consecutive All-Ireland title.

item.title: Spider Loc
item.description: Curtis Williams (born January 19, 1976), more commonly known as Spider Loc, is an American rapper and actor. He was formerly signed to Interscope Records and 50 Cent's G-Unit Records.
